zh.Pays de Caux, Upper Normandy, France: 法國豪-諾門迪帕斯 德 考
zh.Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella de Payes於1024年2月4日出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯時，她的父親Adam de Pays25歲，母親Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta21歲。她於大約1045年與Sir Hugh Corbet在法國結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1085年在英國史洛普爾享年61歲。

zh-hans.Pays de Caux, Upper Normandy, France: 法国豪-諾門迪帕斯 德 考
zh-hans.Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Franc: 法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabella de Payes于1024年2月4日出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯时，她的父亲Adam de Pays25岁，母亲Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta21岁。她于大约1045年与Sir Hugh Corbet在法国结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1085年在英国史洛普爾享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Payes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish (Payés): nickname from payés ‘peasant farmer’, from Catalan pagés. This surname is most common in Guatemala and El Salvador.

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella de Payes was born on 4 February 1024, in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, her father, Adam de Pays, was 25 and her mother, Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta, was 21. She married Sir Hugh Corbet about 1045, in France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1085, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella de Payes est née le 4 février 1024, à Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Adam de Pays, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Hugh Corbet environ 1045, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1085, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella de Payes am 4. Februar 1024 in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Adam de Pays 25 und ihre Mutter Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta 21. Sie hat um 1045 in Frankreich Sir Hugh Corbet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1085 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Shropshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Payes è nata il il 4 febbraio 1024 nel Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, sua padre, Adam de Pays, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Hugh Corbet circa 1045, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1085, nel Shropshire, England, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella de Payesが1024年2月4日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスで生まれた時，父Adam de Paysは25歳，母Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlottaは21歳であった。約1045年にフランスでSir Hugh Corbetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1085年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella de Payes(이)가 1024년 2월 4일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Adam de Pays(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1045년 프랑스에서 Sir Hugh Corbet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1085년 영국 슈럽실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella de Payes nasceu em 4 de fevereiro de 1024, em Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Adam de Pays, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Hugh Corbet aproximadamente 1045, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1085, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella de Payes родилась 4 февраля 1024 г. в местности пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, её отцу по имени Adam de Pays было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Hugh Corbet около 1045 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1085 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabella de Payes nació el 4 de febrero de 1024, en Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Adam de Pays, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Herlève Herleva Harlette Arlette Arlotta, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Hugh Corbet aproximadamente 1045, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1085, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años.
